character.definition: rocky (same as 玤) fine stone which is little less valuable than jade (interchangeable 崩) to collapse; to fall
(same as 馨) fragrance or aroma (especially that which comes from after), (same as 榖) grains and corns; cereals
(non-classical form of 䢼) name of a state in old times, name of a pavilion
(same as 鬮) lots, to draw lots
an echo, a sound to vomit, as an infant
